subject: science
question: 5G तंत्रज्ञानाशी संबंधित खालीलपैकी कोणते वैशिष्ट्य योग्य आहे? / Which of the following is a correct feature associated with 5G technology?
options: A. यामध्ये 4G पेक्षा कमी डेटा स्पीड मिळतो / It provides lower data speed than 4G
B. यामध्ये अत्यंत कमी विलंब (low latency) आणि जास्त डेटा स्पीड मिळतो / It provides very low latency and higher data speed
C. हे केवळ 2G नेटवर्कवर आधारित आहे / It is based only on 2G network
D. यात इंटरनेट ऑफ थिंग्ज (IoT) वापरता येत नाही / IoT cannot be used with it
explanation: 5G is designed to offer significantly higher data speeds and much lower latency compared to 4G, enabling applications like IoT and real-time communication.

subject: science
question: भारताने विकसित केलेली स्वदेशी उपग्रह दिशादर्शन प्रणाली (navigation system) कोणती आहे? / Which is India's indigenously developed satellite navigation system?
options: A. GPS
B. GLONASS
C. NavIC
D. GALILEO
explanation: NavIC (Navigation with Indian Constellation), earlier called IRNSS, is India's own regional satellite navigation system developed by ISRO.

subject: science
question: भारताचे पहिले मानवी अंतराळ मोहिम अभियान 'गगनयान' कोणत्या संस्थेद्वारे राबवले जात आहे? / India's first human spaceflight mission 'Gaganyaan' is being carried out by which organisation?
options: A. DRDO
B. ISRO
C. BARC
D. NASA
explanation: Gaganyaan is India's human spaceflight programme being developed and executed by ISRO (Indian Space Research Organisation).

subject: science
question: ब्लॉकचेन तंत्रज्ञानाबाबत खालीलपैकी कोणते विधान योग्य आहे? / Which of the following statements about blockchain technology is correct?
options: A. ही एक केंद्रीकृत (centralized) डेटाबेस प्रणाली आहे / It is a centralized database system
B. ही विकेंद्रीकृत (decentralized) आणि वितरित खातेवही (distributed ledger) प्रणाली आहे / It is a decentralized and distributed ledger system
C. यामध्ये डेटामध्ये बदल करणे अत्यंत सोपे असते / Data in it can be very easily altered
D. हे तंत्रज्ञान केवळ बँकिंगपुरतेच मर्यादित आहे / This technology is limited only to banking
explanation: Blockchain is a decentralized, distributed ledger technology where data is recorded across multiple nodes, making tampering extremely difficult.

subject: science
question: कृत्रिम बुद्धिमत्ता (Artificial Intelligence) क्षेत्रातील 'मशीन लर्निंग' म्हणजे काय? / In the field of Artificial Intelligence, what does 'Machine Learning' refer to?
options: A. संगणकाला केवळ हार्डवेअर दुरुस्त करण्याची क्षमता / The ability of a computer to only repair hardware
B. डेटावरून अनुभवाने शिकून कामगिरी सुधारण्याची संगणक प्रणालीची क्षमता / The ability of a computer system to improve performance by learning from data/experience without explicit programming
C. फक्त इंटरनेट ब्राउझिंगसाठी वापरले जाणारे तंत्र / A technique used only for internet browsing
D. संगणकाच्या भौतिक रचनेतील बदल / Changes in the physical structure of a computer
explanation: Machine learning is a subset of AI where systems learn patterns from data and improve their performance without being explicitly programmed for every task.

subject: science
question: 'चांद्रयान-3' मोहिमेतील विक्रम लँडर चंद्राच्या कोणत्या भागावर यशस्वीरित्या उतरले? / The Vikram lander of the Chandrayaan-3 mission successfully landed on which region of the Moon?
options: A. चंद्राचा उत्तर ध्रुव / North Pole of the Moon
B. चंद्राचा दक्षिण ध्रुव / South Pole of the Moon
C. चंद्राचा विषुववृत्तीय भाग / Equatorial region of the Moon
D. मंगळ ग्रहाचा पृष्ठभाग / Surface of Mars
explanation: Chandrayaan-3's Vikram lander made a historic soft landing near the South Pole region of the Moon on 23 August 2023, a first for any country.

subject: science
question: CRISPR-Cas9 हे तंत्रज्ञान प्रामुख्याने कोणत्या क्षेत्राशी संबंधित आहे? / CRISPR-Cas9 technology is primarily associated with which field?
options: A. जनुकीय संपादन (Gene editing) / Gene editing
B. हवामान अंदाज / Weather forecasting
C. अंतराळ प्रक्षेपण / Space launch vehicles
D. दूरसंचार / Telecommunications
explanation: CRISPR-Cas9 is a revolutionary gene-editing technology that allows precise modification of DNA sequences in organisms.

subject: science
question: भारतातील पहिली स्वदेशी बनावटीची सुपरकम्प्युटर मालिका कोणती आहे? / What is India's first indigenously developed supercomputer series called?
options: A. PARAM
B. CRAY
C. VIRTU
D. TIANHE
explanation: PARAM is the series of supercomputers developed indigenously by the Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), India, starting with PARAM 8000 in 1991.

subject: science
question: डिजिटल इंडिया कार्यक्रमांतर्गत 'DigiLocker' या सुविधेचा मुख्य उद्देश काय आहे? / Under the Digital India programme, what is the primary purpose of the 'DigiLocker' facility?
options: A. नागरिकांना ऑनलाइन खरेदी करण्याची सुविधा / To enable citizens to shop online
B. नागरिकांच्या महत्त्वाच्या दस्तऐवजांची सुरक्षित डिजिटल साठवणूक व पडताळणी / Secure digital storage and verification of citizens' important documents
C. वीज बिल भरण्याची सुविधा / To facilitate electricity bill payment
D. रेल्वे तिकीट आरक्षण करणे / To book railway tickets
explanation: DigiLocker is a cloud-based platform under Digital India that allows citizens to store, share and verify documents and certificates digitally.

subject: science
question: क्वांटम संगणन (Quantum Computing) मध्ये माहितीचे मूलभूत एकक कोणते आहे? / In quantum computing, what is the basic unit of information called?
options: A. बिट (Bit)
B. बाइट (Byte)
C. क्युबिट (Qubit)
D. पिक्सेल (Pixel)
explanation: A qubit (quantum bit) is the fundamental unit of quantum information, capable of existing in superposition of 0 and 1 states, unlike a classical bit.

subject: science
question: 'आधार' (Aadhaar) कार्डासाठी बायोमेट्रिक माहिती गोळा करण्याचे काम कोणती संस्था करते? / Which authority is responsible for collecting biometric information for the 'Aadhaar' card?
options: A. भारतीय विशिष्ट ओळख प्राधिकरण (UIDAI) / Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI)
B. भारतीय रिझर्व्ह बँक (RBI) / Reserve Bank of India (RBI)
C. निवडणूक आयोग / Election Commission
D. भारतीय दूरसंचार नियामक प्राधिकरण (TRAI) / Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI)
explanation: UIDAI (Unique Identification Authority of India) is the statutory body responsible for issuing Aadhaar numbers and collecting biometric and demographic data.

subject: science
question: 3D प्रिंटिंग तंत्रज्ञानाला असेही म्हटले जाते / 3D printing technology is also known as:
options: A. सबट्रॅक्टिव्ह मॅन्युफॅक्चरिंग (Subtractive Manufacturing) / Subtractive Manufacturing
B. अ‍ॅडिटिव्ह मॅन्युफॅक्चरिंग (Additive Manufacturing) / Additive Manufacturing
C. फोटोलिथोग्राफी / Photolithography
D. न्यूक्लियर फिशन / Nuclear Fission
explanation: 3D printing builds objects layer by layer by adding material, hence it is called additive manufacturing, as opposed to subtractive processes that remove material.
